'''Tavell Geen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Centran]] who served as [[Scrivinir]], of the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]] for most of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and several years afterward.<ref name="THH" />

Little is known of Geen. Prior to becoming Scrivinir, he earned the prestigious title of ''[[Ottdefa/Legends|Ottdefa]]'' from the [[University of Lekua V]].<ref name="THH" />

Geen was outed from office in a bloody military coup by Centrality [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Sris Lehhett]] in the galactic turmoil not long after the beginning of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong invasion]]. He managed to flee with his life to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] where he tried to drum up support among the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for his reinstatement.<ref name="THH" />
